name: requirement_list_state_guide
description: Walk a client-supplied requirement list in array order. First call: pass non-empty requirements array (objects with id, name, depends_on, summary, rationale, inputs, outputs, functional_requirements, acceptance_criteria, test_scope); omit current_state. Later calls: pass current_state ONLY, set to continuation_state from the prior response (requirements ignored). Presents one requirement per step until id end_requirement_list. For each item, follow the agent REQ checklist in project documentation (e.g. agent-req-implementation-checklist.md, S01–S16), strict TDD. Terminal: id end_requirement_list, is_end true; bad token or empty list returns state error.

requirements.description: Requirement objects in walk order. REQUIRED on first call when current_state is omitted or empty.

current_state.description: Opaque continuation_state from the previous response. When set, requirements is ignored; use to get the next requirement.
